title: Creativerse Modpack
description: A Minecraft universe with unlimited creativity
body:
This is a survival and creative friendly modpack intended for both single player and multiplayer use.
The pack includes the best combination of terrain mods, quality of life features, decorational blocks and features, atmospheric visuals making it lightly moded. This modpack changes some vanilla mechanics, making the survival experience more interesting and more indepth.

Features included in the modpack:

⚫ Dark themed for a neutral and pleasent experience

🌅 Shader support for stunnning vissuals

✨ More particles and effects making the world feel more alive

🔊 Dynamic sounds and effects for a further immersive experience

🌦️ Seasons and thirst for a more challenging and interesting survival experience

📚 More decorations such as paintings, blocks and books.

Optional Features in the modpack:

- Axium

- Distant Horizons

- Recommended resourcepacks included.
